parsed.production_notes: The video uses motion graphics to simulate a digital interface, combined with a stock or AI-generated hand asset. The voiceover exhibits a consistent, slightly unnatural cadence typical of AI generation.

characters.appearance: A human right hand with a light complexion. Neatly trimmed nails, visible from the wrist up. Used solely for interacting with the screen.
characters.demeanor: Functional and deliberate, performing tapping and scrolling gestures.

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid light gray background fills the frame. A thin vertical red line with a rounded red pill shape acts as a scrollbar on the right edge. Character A enters from the right, index finger extended, pointing towards the center. Flat, even lighting typical of a digital interface.

scenes.visual_description: A digital interface displays English and Korean text on a light gray background. Colored ovals highlight specific English words in sync with the voiceover. A red scrollbar sits on the right. Character A taps the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Unknown speaker says: Reading is one of the easiest ways to begin — and with EWA, it becomes even more powerful.
Unknown speaker says: Studies show that people who read in English for just 10-15 minutes a day improve their vocabulary much faster than those who don't.
scenes.on_screen_text:
옥스퍼드에서 영어 학습용으로 각색한 책 30권을 읽고 영어 실력을 한 단계 높여보세요 (Read 30 books adapted for English learning by Oxford and take your English skills to the next level)
독서는 언어를 배우는 가장 좋은 방법 중 하나입니다. 그리고 EWA와 함께라면 그 효과는 더욱 강력합니다. (Reading is one of the best ways to learn a language. And with EWA, the effect is even more powerful.)
Reading is one of the easiest ways to begin — and with EWA, it becomes even more powerful.
연구에 따르면 하루 10-15분만 영어로 책을 읽어도, 그렇지 않은 사람들보다 어휘력이 훨씬 빠르게 향상된다고 합니다.. (According to studies, reading books in English for just 10-15 minutes a day improves vocabulary much faster than those who don't..)
Studies show that people who read in English for just 10-15 minutes a day improve their vocabulary much faster than those who don't.

panels.panel_visual_description: The solid light gray background continues. The red scrollbar on the right moves downwards. Character A remains in frame, index finger extended, making tapping motions on the blank space. The composition is static aside from the hand and scrollbar.

scenes.visual_description: The screen scrolls down to reveal more text. Colored highlights appear over words like 'work', 'real', 'everything', and 'instant'. Character A continues to tap the screen rhythmically.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Unknown speaker says: Why does it work so well? Because reading gives you real English — natural phrases, real contexts, and words you'll actually use.
Unknown speaker says: With EWA, everything becomes even simpler: You get interactive bilingual books with instant translation, so you understand every sentence without stopping.
scenes.on_screen_text:
왜 이렇게 잘 작동할까요? 독서는 살아 있는 영어를 그대로 접하게 해주기 때문입니다. 자연스러운 표현, 실제 상황 속 맥락, 그리고 (Why does it work so well? Because reading allows you to encounter living English as it is. Natural expressions, context in real situations, and)
Why does it work so well? Because reading gives you real English — natural phrases, real contexts, and words you'll actually use.
더 쉽고 즉시 번역 멈추지 않고도 이해할 수 있습니다. (Easier and instant translation, you can understand without stopping.)
With EWA, everything becomes even simpler: You get interactive bilingual books with instant translation, so you understand every sentence without stopping.

panels.panel_visual_description: The light gray background persists. The red scrollbar continues its downward progression. Character A's hand is visible, performing tapping gestures. The framing remains a tight shot on the interface.

scenes.visual_description: Further scrolling reveals a list of genres. Highlights appear on words like 'choose', 'classics', and 'audiobooks'. Character A taps along with the highlighted text.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Unknown speaker says: You can choose stories you love — classics, bestsellers, business books, fantasy, romance, mystery, self-development, and more.
Unknown speaker says: And if you want to switch your format, you can move to audiobooks,
scenes.on_screen_text:
고전, 베스트셀러, 비즈니스, 판타지, 로맨스, 미스터리, 자기계발 등 좋아하는 장르를 자유롭게 선택해 보세요. (Freely choose your favorite genres such as classics, bestsellers, business, fantasy, romance, mystery, self-development, etc.)
You can choose stories you love — classics, bestsellers, business books, fantasy, romance, mystery, self-development, and more.
형식을 바꾸고 싶다면 오디오북이나 영화 장면으로 넘어가거나, (If you want to change the format, you can move to audiobooks or movie scenes, or)
And if you want to switch your format, you can move to audiobooks,

panels.panel_visual_description: The light gray background remains. The red scrollbar reaches the lower section of its track. Character A's hand is present, index finger pointing and tapping. Visual elements are minimal, focusing on the interaction.

scenes.visual_description: The final section of text is displayed. Highlights appear on 'practice', 'progress', and 'start thinking'. Character A makes final taps as the voiceover concludes.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Unknown speaker says: movie scenes, or practice speaking with our AI Tutor.
Unknown speaker says: Just 10-15 minutes a day is enough to see real progress.
Unknown speaker says: Little by little, EWA helps you start thinking in English, not just studying it.
scenes.on_screen_text:
AI 튜터와 함께 말하기 연습을 할 수도 있습니다. (You can also practice speaking with an AI tutor.)
movie scenes, or practice speaking with our AI Tutor.
하루 10-15분이면 충분합니다. 꾸준히 하다 보면 영어 실력이 조금씩 향상되고 진정한 진전을 느낄 수 있습니다. (10-15 minutes a day is enough. If you do it consistently, your English skills will gradually improve and you can feel real progress.)
Just 10-15 minutes a day is enough to see real progress.
EWA와 함께라면 규칙을 외우는 데 그치지 않고, 영어로 생각하는 습관을 기를 수 있습니다. (With EWA, you don't just memorize rules, you can develop the habit of thinking in English.)
Little by little, EWA helps you start thinking in English, not just studying it.
